user_message_snippet: Write a Python script named code_run_cancel.py that prints start, sleeps for 120 seconds, then prints done.

preprocessing.title: Long-running Python cancellation script
preprocessing.chat_summary: User requests a long-running Python script for Code Run cancellation verification.

9f8d9702-2d4e-4d6b-93db-b9cc7080b0c7.code_content:
import time

print("start", flush=True)
time.sleep(120)
print("done", flush=True)

thinking_content: Preparing a long-running Python script so Code Run cancellation can be verified.
